name: Chromium
compose:
name: slashnode-chromium
services:
  chromium:
    image: ghcr.io/linuxserver/chromium:version-8d3cb5f1
    container_name: chromium
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - chromium_data:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:30099:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  chromium_data:
    name: slashnode-chromium_chromium_data
